title: Rewrite And Witness
prompt: A sphinx bars the room. Complete its proof to banish it.
help: This room holds 2 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) forward(Nat, 0 + n, n, add_zero_left(n), n = _) then ⊢ n = n; by refl(Nat, n);. (2) exists_intro(T, λ (z : T) st z = a, a) then ⊢ a = a; by refl(T, a);.
